column1: ASOG TBI Dataset Repository - Rapid MVP Community Task Board
Branch: rapid-mvp | Purpose: feature/outcome tasks for shared Google Sheet tracker | Import header row: 3 | First data row: 4

column4: TASK DESCRIPTION
column14: EXPECTED OUTPUT / EVIDENCE

column4: Browse results feel clear and usable. Review the Browse Datasets page and improve spacing, result density, empty state, active filter visibility, and mobile layout without changing the core route behavior.
column14: Guest and logged-in browse pages are readable on desktop and mobile; filters do not dominate results; empty state is clear. Evidence: desktop and mobile screenshots.

column4: Dataset Preview behaves like a real preview. Polish modal content, focus behavior, close behavior, and responsive layout so users can scan metadata before opening the detail page.
column14: Preview opens from each result, closes by button/backdrop/Escape, returns focus to the trigger, and does not overlap or clip content. Evidence: short screen recording or screenshots.

column4: Detail page encourages citation before download. Improve the dataset detail sidebar and citation area so metadata, citation, BibTeX, and Download ZIP are easy to find in the right order.
column14: Citation and BibTeX are visible before or near download; Download ZIP remains on detail page only; recommendations still render. Evidence: screenshot plus manual download check.
column15: Do not re-add browse direct download.

column4: Citation text is easy to reuse. Add copy-to-clipboard buttons for plain citation and BibTeX with visible success feedback.
column14: Both copy buttons copy the correct text and show a short confirmation. Evidence: manual test note and screenshot.
column15: Keep JavaScript small and local or shared.

column4: Upload form is contributor-friendly. Improve upload form labels, helper text, validation display, anonymization confirmation, and file guidance.
column14: A new contributor can understand required metadata and ZIP upload rules; invalid submission errors are specific and readable. Evidence: screenshots for normal and validation-error states.
column15: Upload must still create Pending Review.

column4: My Datasets clearly shows ownership and status. Improve cards so status, access type, edit/archive actions, and next step are obvious.
column14: Owner can distinguish Published, Pending Review, Revision Requested, Rejected, and Archived items at a glance. Evidence: screenshot with seeded or test records.

column4: Edit/update flow explains review impact. Improve the edit page copy and states so contributors know when changes preserve status versus return to Pending Review.
column14: Edit form communicates versioning and review impact; update still increments version and respects owner-only access. Evidence: manual edit test note.

column4: Password reset is locally auditable. Verify and refine forgot-password/reset-password pages, invalid token state, expired token state, and success messages.
column14: Active account can request reset in development, use displayed link, change password, and log in with the new password; invalid token shows a clear message. Evidence: manual test note with routes checked.
column15: Email sending remains out of scope.

column4: Login and registration feel polished. Review forms for labels, autocomplete, helper copy, validation errors, and mobile layout.
column14: Login/register are clear on desktop and mobile; errors are readable; seeded account remains visible for local demo. Evidence: screenshots and one failed-login test note.
column15: Do not switch to Google auth.

column4: Dataset access rules are protected by tests. Add feature tests for guest browse, logged-in browse, detail access, private/restricted access behavior, and detail-page download.
column13: tests/; app/Controllers/Datasets.php only if bug fix needed
column14: Tests pass and cover public, institutional, restricted, private, archived, and non-published cases. Evidence: composer test output.

column4: Contributor lifecycle is protected by tests. Add feature tests for upload, owner edit, version increment, owner archive, and non-owner denial.
column13: tests/; upload/dataset controllers only if bug fix needed
column14: Tests prove contributor can manage own datasets but not others; upload starts Pending Review; archive removes from public browse. Evidence: composer test output.

column4: Demo data supports UI review. Expand MvpSeeder to include records for all useful public/user states and access labels without duplicating rows when rerun.
column14: Seeder can be run repeatedly; demo includes enough records to inspect access labels and owner statuses. Evidence: php spark db:seed MvpSeeder plus screenshots.

column4: Validation rules are consistent. Review controller/model validation for dataset metadata, access type, ZIP upload, password fields, and required fields.
column14: Invalid input is rejected with clear messages; status/access values remain closed sets. Evidence: test output or manual validation notes.

column4: Recommendations are understandable. Improve recommendation display with category/type context and verify recommendation candidates respect access and published status.
column14: Similar datasets are relevant enough for MVP and never show unauthorized/archived/rejected records. Evidence: screenshot and test/manual note.
column15: No AI/ML recommender in this branch.

column4: Public homepage communicates the product. Review home page sections, featured datasets, partner logos, calls to action, and mobile layout.
column14: Home page explains browse/upload value, shows real seeded/Published data, and is visually consistent. Evidence: desktop and mobile screenshots.

column4: App shell is consistent. Review header, mobile nav, footer, active links, flash notices, and authenticated/guest states.
column14: Navigation works for guest and logged-in users; logout form works with CSRF; notices are readable. Evidence: screenshots for guest and logged-in nav.

column4: Accessibility basics are covered. Check labels, keyboard focus, modal behavior, contrast, form errors, and skip/screen-reader utility classes.
column14: Main flows can be navigated by keyboard; form fields have labels; modal focus and close behavior are acceptable. Evidence: accessibility checklist notes.

column4: Handoff docs are teammate-ready. Improve README/SETUP/TASKS wording only where a new teammate would be confused after reading once.
column14: A teammate can clone, configure, migrate, seed, run, test, and choose a task without asking for chat history. Evidence: reviewer note or doc diff.

column4: Deployment checklist exists. Add a deploy checklist for school/shared hosting: PHP version, web root, writable folders, env, database, migrations, HTTPS, and seed policy.
column14: Checklist exists and separates local dev from deployment. Evidence: link to doc.
column15: Do not deploy from this task.

column4: Branch audit is repeatable. Create a short audit template teammates can paste into PRs after testing their task.
column14: Template includes what changed, screenshots/tests, manual route checks, and known limits. Evidence: template committed.
